subject: Quality Fit curve drop
body:
Hi everyone,

I have a concerned with my data :
it seems there is a redundant drop in the quality fit curves of my data set 
at a given spatial frequency range (5 - 7 anstrom, see screenshots).

Is it something relevant or should I ignore this ?
What could be the cause ? I do not see particular features in the  Fourier 
space image which could explain this deviation between fit and data.

Thank you,
Julien
